subject: Scyther — large green mantis-like creature with prominent blade-arms raised in an aggressive stance
description: A green bipedal insectoid creature stands in a forward-facing aggressive pose, its large curved scythe-arms raised and prominent. The creature has visible wings folded at its back, a pointed head, and a powerful athletic build. The background is a bright wash of yellow-green, giving the impression of open daylight in a grassy or jungle environment. The overall palette is vivid greens with yellow highlights, conveying speed and aggression.
foreground: green mantis creature with raised scythe-arms
